_note: Observer watcher config (bun run watch). symbols = PRIORITY names for the fast-move alerter — a SEED, not the entry universe. Lane-1 candidates are sourced market-wide via `bun run discover` (POLICY §3.1a, v0.3.8); this list just gets a between-run heads-up. Held names come from book.json automatically. Thresholds loose for false-positive measurement.
